skill_execution.question: Compare HAM vs LEC fastest times in turn 3 in australia

sql:
WITH DriverCodes AS (
    SELECT
        driver_number,
        name_acronym
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.driver_mapping_2026
    WHERE
        name_acronym IN ('HAM', 'LEC')
),
FastestCornerTimes AS (
    SELECT
        cf.driver_number,
        MIN(cf.corner_duration_sec) AS fastest_corner_time_sec
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.corner_features AS cf
    WHERE
        cf.season = 2026
        AND cf.event_name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
        AND cf.corner_number = 3
        AND cf.driver_number IN (SELECT driver_number FROM DriverCodes)
    GROUP BY
        cf.driver_number
)
SELECT
    dc.name_acronym AS driver_code,
    FORMAT("%02d:%02d.%03d",
        CAST(FLOOR(fct.fastest_corner_time_sec / 60) AS INT64),
        CAST(FLOOR(MOD(CAST(fct.fastest_corner_time_sec AS NUMERIC), 60)) AS INT64),
        CAST(MOD(CAST(fct.fastest_corner_time_sec * 1000 AS INT64), 1000) AS INT64)
    ) AS formatted_corner_time
FROM
    FastestCornerTimes AS fct
JOIN
    DriverCodes AS dc
ON
    fct.driver_number = dc.driver_number
ORDER BY
    fct.fastest_corner_time_sec ASC
LIMIT 50
